items.name: Streetwear Sticker
items.description: A premium streetwear sticker-style illustration with a thick white outline and bold black contour. The most versatile, reliable style — single athletes, groups, and family photos.

items.name: Big Head
items.description: A clean 2D comic-style illustration with a modern arcade-game feel — the head playfully enlarged while the face stays realistic and recognizable. Bold outlines, smooth cel shading.

items.name: Minimal
items.description: A minimalist flat-vector sports illustration with solid color blocking and a clean graphic-poster feel. Simple, bold, and built to reproduce consistently.
